---
title: "A Novel Series-Concatenation Hybrid Prediction Model of Energy Consumption in Hot Strip Roughing Process With Multi-Step Rolling"
authors:
  - "Y. Zhong"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "J. Rao"
  - "J. Xu"
  - "Shunyu Wu"
year: 2024
venue: "IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering"
status: "published"
type: "co-author"
doi: "10.1109/TASE.2023.3299185"
url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/TASE.2023.3299185"
keywords:
  - "energy prediction"
  - "industrial AI"
  - "multi-step rolling"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Published  
**DOI:** [10.1109/TASE.2023.3299185](https://doi.org/10.1109/TASE.2023.3299185)

Selected collaboration on hybrid modeling of energy consumption in hot strip roughing processes with multi-step rolling structure.
